subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Kingdom of Abhá! Open thou the eye of insight, that thou mayest witness the effulgent lights and brilliant emanations from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر بملکوت ابهی چشم بصیرت باز کن تا مشاهده انوار ساطعه و تجلیات لامعه از
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @firmness in the Covenant, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
